source_commit.summary: The approved Parent Coach Desk candidate was staged in full, passed the staged diff check, and was committed as one immutable local Git release candidate. The Git revision at handoff is authoritative; no push or deployment is implied.
evidence: git diff --cached --check before local release commit
clean Git worktree immediately after local release commit

production_manifest.summary: Local production manifest contract passes against production configuration.

tests_and_build.summary: Local unit and integration suites, coverage floors, Astro diagnostics, exact production build and generated deployment manifest passed; deployment remains separately gated.
evidence: 103 unit test files and 550 unit tests passed on 2026-07-17
10 integration test files and 44 integration tests passed on 2026-07-17
Coverage on 2026-07-17: 70.08% statements, 61.64% branches, 71.02% functions, 73.63% lines
The disposable-D1 integration suite is explicitly single-threaded after the default fork pool produced an incomplete run with a worker crash
Exact production build and manifest contract passed on 2026-07-17
Generated bundle contains the administrative guard before Astro delegation and the manifest includes Worker-first exact/nested admin paths

Route, cache, rate-limit, mobile, privacy-claim, trust-response, approval, delivery-ambiguity, deletion-lifecycle, notification-outbox, commerce test-mode, affiliate-claim and newsletter-provider boundaries have focused tests

secret_scan.summary: Current repository files and complete Git history passed the secret scanner; the current registry-backed high-threshold dependency audit reported zero known vulnerabilities.
evidence: npm audit --audit-level=high on 2026-07-17: zero known vulnerabilities

access_policy.summary: A fresh authenticated dashboard read-only export proves the Parent Coach Desk Production Admin application covers parentcoachdesk.com/admin* and /api/admin* with one bounded allow policy. The policy admits exactly eepskalla@gmail.com and jeffthomas4@gmail.com; it does not allow everyone. The Worker runtime remains an independently tracked deployment-drift and post-deploy concern.

anonymous_access_probes.summary: A fresh anonymous GET-only probe covered all 37 current protected routes; every route returned a redacted 302 to the expected Cloudflare Access origin, including the five newly classified trust draft/delivery routes.

authenticated_access_probes.summary: A non-mutating 37-route allowed/denied identity probe contract exists, but no redacted live results have been recorded.

database_backup.summary: Four manual backup-proving runs now exist. The fourth fresh export is byte-identical to the export used by the controlled local restore and two-clone candidate proof, but copies remain local-only and immutable offsite evidence is absent. No fresh post-repair export exists because production remains unchanged.

database_restore.summary: The latest controlled local restore of the shared activity-radar export found five camp_scan_queue-to-organizations foreign-key violations. Two disposable clones each removed exactly those five derived queue orphans and then passed integrity and zero-FK validation, but production remains unchanged. A separately approved, preconditioned production repair and fresh post-repair export/restore are still required.

r2_recovery.summary: A synthetic remote staging object was restored between isolated staging and recovery buckets with matching SHA-256. Production media inventory, independent export, and representative production-object recovery remain unproved.

rollback_target.summary: The currently active, fully bound Worker version is pinned as the exact rollback target for the next approved release. The original code-upload version lacks three secret bindings and Pages exposes historical admin artifacts, so neither is accepted.

rollback_rehearsal.summary: A no-side-effect storage-aware tabletop passes and rejects Pages/data-rollback confusion, but no Worker rollback or non-production operational rehearsal has executed.

customer_journeys.summary: The isolated populated staging directory has zero page overflow at 320, 360, 390 and 430px, and its fixture detail page passes 320px portrait and 568px landscape reflow. A fresh staging deployment includes the skip target main with tabindex -1, and public home, directory, privacy, terms, /api/health, and /api/ready checks are healthy. The available browser automation did not dispatch a native fragment navigation when it clicked the skip link, so native keyboard activation remains unproved rather than failed. Sport, league/full-listing and ZIP-radius filters plus the detail route were exercised. 200% zoom, reliable keyboard activation, screen-reader, real touch, constrained-network, failure and complete form/subscription/payment journeys remain pending; production's prior populated overflow finding is not closed by staging alone.

notification_receipt.summary: Resend confirms a staging-only internal administrator alert was delivered after parentcoachdesk.com verification and the configured Slack webhook accepted the preceding fail-closed routing post. The message did not surface in the intended #pcd-alerts channel, and no Jeff Thomas acknowledgement has been recorded, so the receipt remains pending and does not prove the operator path end to end.

failure_isolation.summary: A local integrated simulation proves D1, Forge, scheduler, notification-ambiguity and public-monitor isolation, but environment-level failure and receipt evidence remain absent.

open_risk_decision.summary: Open stop-ship risks have not been explicitly accepted or closed for this candidate.

deploy_approval.summary: No release-specific approval for a production deployment of an immutable source commit has been recorded.

migration_approval.summary: Read-only production evidence proves DB is the incompatible Activity Radar graph lineage. A new empty, dedicated production PCD operational D1 database exists in WNAM and its source binding is prepared but not deployed. The live staging Worker uses only separate synthetic-directory and operations databases and no Forge database binding. PCD_OPS_DB is migrated through 0022 in staging and its pre- and post-migration exports restored separately. No production migration, binding deployment, or customer-data write has occurred.

post_deploy_observation.summary: Cannot exist until a separately approved deployment occurs.
